description: 渲染层降级与核心交互修复：移除 Rough.js 依赖，统一使用原生 Canvas 2D 渲染，修复交互层拖尾残影、向左/向上拖拽绘制失效、选中图形拉伸不稳定等致命缺陷。

userStories.title: Remove Rough.js dependency and roughness-related data properties
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove the Rough.js library and all roughness-related properties so that the project has fewer dependencies and a smaller bundle size.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove `roughjs` from package.json dependencies and node_modules
Remove `roughness` and `seed` properties from SceneElement interface and all related type definitions
Remove all `roughjs` import statements from the codebase
Clean up all code paths that referenced roughness/seed properties
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Rewrite drawElement function to use native Canvas 2D APIs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to rewrite the drawElement rendering function to use native Canvas 2D APIs so that all shapes render as clean, standard vector geometry.
acceptanceCriteria: Rectangles rendered using ctx.strokeRect() and ctx.fillRect()
Rhombuses rendered using ctx.beginPath() + ctx.moveTo() + ctx.lineTo() + ctx.closePath()
Lines rendered using ctx.beginPath() + ctx.moveTo() + ctx.lineTo()
Arrows rendered with standard paths plus arrowhead triangle, no hand-drawn jitter
All shape types render correctly on both Static and Interactive Canvas layers
Shape style properties (strokeColor, fillColor, strokeWidth) still apply correctly
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix Interactive Canvas ghosting/trail artifacts during drawing
userStories.description: As a user, I want the drawing canvas to not leave ghosting trails when I drag to create shapes, so that my workspace stays clean and responsive.
acceptanceCriteria: Interactive Canvas cleared with ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height) before each draft redraw in pointermove handler
clearRect only affects Interactive Canvas, Static Canvas and its committed shapes are unaffected
Dragging to draw shows only one live draft shape, no overlapping ghost trails
After pointerup, draft disappears completely, only committed shape remains on Static Canvas
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix left/up direction drag drawing failure
userStories.description: As a user, I want to draw shapes by dragging the mouse in any direction (left, up, right, down), so that the drawing experience feels natural.
acceptanceCriteria: Dragging left from start point renders rectangle/rhombus correctly
Dragging up from start point renders rectangle/rhombus correctly
Dragging in all diagonal directions (top-left, bottom-left, top-right, bottom-right) renders correctly
Coordinate calculation uses Math.min(startX, currentX) for x/y and Math.abs(currentX - startX) for width/height
Committed shape position and dimensions on Static Canvas match actual mouse drag trajectory
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Fix unstable resize behavior on selected shapes
userStories.description: As a user, I want to reliably resize a selected shape by dragging its handles, so that I can precisely adjust shape dimensions.
acceptanceCriteria: Selected shape displays standard resize handles (nw, ne, sw, se, n, s, e, w) positioned on exact mathematical bounding box
Dragging corner handles (nw, ne, sw, se) correctly updates shape x, y, width, height based on mouse delta
Dragging edge midpoint handles (n, s, e, w) correctly adjusts dimension in corresponding direction
Shape bounding box tracks mouse cursor position during drag, no jumping or misalignment
Shape width and height constrained to minimum 1 pixel to prevent axis-crossing flip issues
Released mouse commits resized shape to Static Canvas
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
